title: InterPoll Vote payload (v1)
description: The vote payload recorded in the local chain (types/chain.ts Vote) and hashed into a chain block. Normative companion to IPP-03 and IPP-05.

deviceId.description: Device fingerprint hash. Dedup identity precedence prefers the signer pubkey (from the enclosing chain block / vote-cast event) over deviceId — see IPP-05 and IPP-08. deviceId is retained for legacy records and as a fallback signal.
